zh.lifeSummary: Catherine de Bedingfield是Sir Peter de Bedingfield的女兒，於大約1299年出生在英國素福爾可貝汀菲兒。她於1321年與John de Berney在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1374年在英國英格蘭素福爾可享年77歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Catherine de Bedingfield是Sir Peter de Bedingfield的女儿，于大约1299年出生在英国素福爾可貝汀菲兒。她于1321年与John de Berney在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1374年在英国英格兰素福爾可享年77岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Bedingfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Suffolk and Norfolk): variant of   Beddingfield  .

variants.name: Beddingfield
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from Bedingfield in Suffolk. The placename is recorded in Domesday Book as Bedingefelda, from the Old English personal name Bēda + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + feld ‘open country’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Catherine de Bedingfield was born about 1299, in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England as the daughter of Sir Peter de Bedingfield. She married John de Berney in 1321, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1374, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77, and was buried in Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Catherine de Bedingfield est née environ 1299, à Bedingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, fille de Sir Peter de Bedingfield. Elle a épousé John de Berney en 1321, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1374, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Catherine de Bedingfield wurde um 1299 in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, als Tochter von Sir Peter de Bedingfield geboren. Sie hat 1321 in England John de Berney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1374 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Catherine de Bedingfield è nata il circa 1299 nel Bedingfield, Suffolk, England come figlia di Sir Peter de Bedingfield. Lei sposato John de Berney nel 1321, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1374, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine de Bedingfieldは約1299年にイギリススフォルクベディングフィールドでSir Peter de Bedingfieldの娘として生まれた。1321年にイギリスでJohn de Berneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1374年にイギリスイギリススフォルクで77歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine de Bedingfield(은)는 대략 1299년 영국 수폴크 베딩필드에서 Sir Peter de Bedingfield의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1321년 영국에서 John de Berney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1374년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크에 묻혔다.

mg.about 1299–about 1374: tany ho any amin'ny 1299–tany ho any amin'ny 1374

pt.lifeSummary: Catherine de Bedingfield nasceu aproximadamente 1299, em Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra filha de Sir Peter de Bedingfield. Ela casou-se com John de Berney em 1321, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1374, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Catherine de Bedingfield родилась около 1299 г. в местности бедингфиелд, суффолк, Англия. Её отца звали Sir Peter de Bedingfield. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Berney в 1321 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1374 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности суффолк, Англия.

sm.about 1299–about 1374: e tusa o le 1299–e tusa o le 1374

es.lifeSummary: Catherine de Bedingfield nació aproximadamente 1299, en Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra como hija de Sir Peter de Bedingfield. Se casó con John de Berney en 1321, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1374, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Suffolk, Inglaterra.
